<var>
$GDPS$ = Normal Damage / Firerate
$BDPS$ = Splash Damage / Bomb Cooldown
$TDPS$ = $GDPS$ + $BDPS$
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 500; 225; 625; 1500; 3000; 7000
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 4; 2; 0
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Greased Guns; Bombs away!; Aerial Ace; Spy Plane; The Surging Sky
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 17847640091; 17847639896; 17847640366; 17847640366; 17847640211
$TREF$ = <ref>Calculated as Gun DPS + Bomb DPS.</ref>
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Normal Damage !! Splash Damage !! Firerate !! Bomb Cooldown !! Range !! Explosion Range !! Hidden Detection Range !! Speed Multiplier !! DPS$TREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || N/A || 0.22 || N/A || 9 || N/A || N/A || 1 || $GDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || N/A || 0.22 || N/A || 9 || N/A || N/A || 1 || $GDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 4 || 10 || 0.22 || 4 || 9 || 3 || N/A || 1 || $TDPS$<ref>$GDPS$ Gun DPS + $BDPS$ Bomb DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 5 || 30 || 0.15 || 4 || 10 || 3 || N/A || 1.1 ||  $TDPS$<ref>$GDPS$ Gun DPS + $BDPS$ Bomb DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 8 || 30 || 0.15 || 2 || 10 || 3 || 10 || 1.1 ||  $TDPS$<ref>$GDPS$ Gun DPS + $BDPS$ Bomb DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 14 || 45 || 0.12 || 1.5 || 10 || 4 || 10 || 1.35 || $TDPS$<ref>$GDPS$ Gun DPS + $BDPS$ Bomb DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
